ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "h_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "a_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "h_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "a_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_h_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("h_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_a_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("a_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team (e.g., MUFC for Manchester United) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's manager */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's position */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES player_positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., AMC, AML) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "xG" REAL /* Expected goals (xG) contributed by the player */,
  "xA" REAL /* Expected assists (xA) contributed by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "key_passes" INTEGER /* Number of key passes made by the player */,
  "npg" INTEGER /* Number of non-penalty goals (npg) scored by the player */,
  "xGChain" REAL /* Expected goals chain (xGChain) contributed by the player */,
  "xGBuildup" REAL /* Expected goals buildup (xGBuildup) contributed by the player */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered by the player during the match */,
  "possessions_won" INTEGER /* Number of possessions won by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "xG" REAL /* Expected goals (xG) contributed by the player */,
  "xA" REAL /* Expected assists (xA) contributed by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "key_passes" INTEGER /* Number of key passes made by the player */,
  "npg" INTEGER /* Number of non-penalty goals (npg) scored by the player */,
  "xGChain" REAL /* Expected goals chain (xGChain) contributed by the player */,
  "xGBuildup" REAL /* Expected goals buildup (xGBuildup) contributed by the player */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered by the player during the season */,
  "possessions_won" INTEGER /* Number of possessions won by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2021-2022) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the roster belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the roster belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player in the roster */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the roster (e.g., starter, substitute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match detail */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the detail belongs to */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_details_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions_history" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position the player played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player started playing the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player stopped playing the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the event belongs to */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., goal, red card) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_award_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_type_id") REFERENCES award_types ("award_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_types" (
  "award_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award type */,
  "award_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the award type (e.g., Player of the Year, Top Scorer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birth date of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birth date of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)
